rationale: The cited paper appears only once, in a robustness-check discussion about possible points-threshold effects (an analogy to airline-mile reward thresholds). It is used as a background empirical example to justify ruling out a confound, not to build the paper's main theory, hypotheses, design, or core causal interpretation. The citing paper's central framing relies on mental accounting and incentive-compensation literature instead, so this citation functions as a passing support reference.
